'''Fehern''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Eddel]]ians. In the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Eddelian trading ships would be seen in adjoining systems. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] fought a [[Eddelian-Empire War|war]] against the Eddell, eliminated most of the technology owned by them. Only a few thousand remained with most subjugated as [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]].
